tools.name: hyperliquid_get_market_data
tools.description:
Use this when you need Hyperliquid perpetual futures data for a specific coin. Returns full L2 order book depth with real-time pricing and funding metrics in one call.

1. bids: array of bid levels with price and size
2. asks: array of ask levels with price and size
3. midPrice: current mid price be

tools.name: hyperliquid_get_market_data
tools.description:
Use this when you need Hyperliquid perpetual futures data for a specific coin. Returns full L2 order book depth with real-time pricing and funding metrics in one call. POST variant of hyperliquid_get_market_data -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. bids: array of bid level

tools.name: hyperliquid_get_all_markets
tools.description:
Use this when you need a snapshot of all Hyperliquid perpetual markets at once. Returns pricing, funding, and volume data for every listed asset in a single call.

1. markets: array of all listed perp assets
2. Each market contains: coin, midPrice, markPrice, fundingRate, openInterest, volume24h, da

tools.name: hyperliquid_get_all_markets
tools.description:
Use this when you need a snapshot of all Hyperliquid perpetual markets at once. Returns pricing, funding, and volume data for every listed asset in a single call. POST variant of hyperliquid_get_all_markets -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. markets: array of all listed

tools.name: hyperliquid_get_candles
tools.description:
Use this when you need historical OHLCV candlestick data for a Hyperliquid perpetual pair. Returns open, high, low, close, volume for the specified interval.

1. candles: array of OHLCV bars
2. Each candle contains: timestamp, open, high, low, close, volume
3. coin: the coin symbol queried
4. interv

tools.name: hyperliquid_get_candles
tools.description:
Use this when you need historical OHLCV candlestick data for a Hyperliquid perpetual pair. Returns open, high, low, close, volume for the specified interval. POST variant of hyperliquid_get_candles -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. candles: array of OHLCV bars
2. Each c

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: hyperliquid_get_market_data, hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_candles · Private data: hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_all_markets · Public sink: hyperliquid_get_market_data, hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_candles · Destructive: hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_all_markets.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: hyperliquid_get_market_data, hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_candles · Private data: hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_all_markets · Public sink: hyperliquid_get_market_data, hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_candles · Destructive: hyperliquid_get_all_markets, hyperliquid_get_all_markets

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

findings.title: Tool description changed since last scan
findings.detail: Tool "hyperliquid_get_market_data" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet:
before: "(hash f9c61a35)" → after: "Use this when you need Hyperliquid perpetual futures data for a specific coin. Returns full L2 order book depth with real-time pricing and funding metrics in one call. POST variant of hyperliquid_get_market_data -- same params passed as JSON body instead of query string.

1. bids: array of bid level"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
